title: Xtra Fluffy French Cheese Souffle
description: A rich and decadent French dish from Normandy, featuring a long-fermentation dough and a blend of cheeses, perfect for a date night dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, mustard powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and heavy cream.
Add the grated parmesan cheese and shredded gruyere cheese to the bowl with the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the flour mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a buttered souffle dish and smooth the top.
Bake the souffle for 35 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown.
Remove the souffle from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
